sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113941" key="xhtosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χητ-οσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113941.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">desolation, loneliness,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.408</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
